title: 新豆包手机备货数十万台，AI 不再硬操作头部应用
content: ByteDance's new Doubao phone has increased inventory from 30,000 to hundreds of thousands of units. The AI will no longer use GUI screen-reading or simulated click techniques to control third-party apps. Instead, it will only access apps when they provide MCP services with opened data and control permissions. The team is negotiating with major app developers to secure callable interfaces and service capabilities.

title: 苹果与 OpenAI 法律战升级：约 40 名前员工收到苹果律师函
content: Apple sued OpenAI and two former employees for trade secret theft, alleging systematic poaching to accelerate AI hardware development. Former employees Tang Tan and Chang Liu are accused of probing for unpublished product information and illegally downloading confidential files. Apple sent legal preservation notices to about 40 other ex-employees now at OpenAI, where over 400 former Apple staff work. OpenAI denies the allegations. The companies' partnership has soured since integrating ChatGPT into iPhones in 2024.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 新浪科技

title: Claude 帮我来逆向 真的很有意思 有人也研究这个么
content: A developer used Claude Opus to reverse-engineer the Futu/Moomoo macOS client's private protocol, creating "futu-moni"—a zero-dependency Python command-line tool that retrieves real-time stock quotes for Hong Kong, US, and Japanese markets without requiring OpenD, API keys, or the official SDK. The tool works by replaying login packets, parsing the proprietary FT protocol over TCP 443, querying the client's local SQLite database for internal security IDs, and automatically routing requests by market.
eventKey: claude-帮我来逆向-真的很有意思-有人也研究这个么
normalizedTitle: claude 帮我来逆向 真的很有意思 有人也研究这个么

title: 突发叫停，Gemini 3.5 Pro难产，谷歌跌入失望陷阱
content: Google has indefinitely delayed its Gemini 3.5 Pro AI model ("Cappuccino"), reportedly by months, due to failing internal benchmarks—particularly in coding capabilities. Emergency training data updates produced "disappointing" results. The delay exposes deep structural problems at Google: bureaucratic inefficiency slows decision-making; engineer distrust of AI-generated code limited training data; and capital expenditure of $35.7 billion in Q1 still left internal teams facing GPU shortages. Talent is fleeing to rivals. Analysts frame this as part of an industry-wide "next-generation giant model disappointment trap," where scaling laws show diminishing returns, high-quality training data is exhausted, and Transformer architecture approaches limits.
eventKey: 突发叫停-gemini-pro难产-谷歌跌入失望陷阱
normalizedTitle: 突发叫停 gemini 3 5 pro难产 谷歌跌入失望陷阱

title: 36氪首发 | 这家人形机器人ODM厂商获千万融资，飞荣达、索辰科技接连下注
content: BXI Robotics, a Chinese humanoid robot ODM provider, raised tens of millions of yuan in a new funding round led by listed company Soscano Technology, following an earlier 2025 round from Feirongda. Founded in 2022, the company develops full-stack bipedal robots including proprietary joint motors, control systems, and software. Its "Sprite" robots completed Beijing's humanoid robot half-marathon in 2025 and 2026. BXI serves tech firms, automakers, and vertical applications, with monthly production capacity of dozens of units expandable to 100+. It targets overseas markets including the U.S., Korea, Japan, and Europe, and forecasts annual revenue exceeding 100 million yuan by 2027.

title: 韩国股市“疯牛”之后“熊出没”，2.3万亿韩元被强平，总统紧急下场干预
content: South Korea's KOSPI index surged 116% by June 2026, then plunged 25%, triggering 2.3 trillion won in forced liquidations between May and mid-July. Retail investors, heavily using margin trading and leveraged ETFs on stocks like Samsung and SK Hynix, suffered massive losses. The market saw 36 trading halts and 7 circuit breakers. President Lee Jae-myung intervened, prompting regulators to ban new single-stock leveraged ETFs, raise margin requirements, and limit purchases. Analysts say deleveraging remains incomplete, with structural risks persisting until margin debt and forced liquidations stabilize.
eventKey: 韩国股市“疯牛”之后“熊出没”-3万亿韩元被强平-总统紧急下场干预
normalizedTitle: 韩国股市“疯牛”之后“熊出没” 2 3万亿韩元被强平 总统紧急下场干预

title: 对存储当下、未来风险与机遇的思考
content: Storage and interconnect stocks plunged amid market panic, but their decline logic differs. Storage's drop reflects valuation correction after crowded trades, not fundamentals, as HBM technology creates genuine moats through deep customization with GPUs. Interconnect's fall stems purely from risk-aversion-driven deleveraging, with no operational deterioration. The real near-term risk is potential broad-market selloff should optimistic macro expectations fail. Earnings season shows extreme intolerance for merely meeting expectations. Short-term demand pushback on pricing exists, yet long-term AI's shift from compute to memory bottlenecks supports massive value revaluation, with over 60% HBM revenue locked in long-term contracts enabling stable margins warranting growth-stock multiples rather than traditional cyclical valuation.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵
eventKey: 对存储当下-未来风险与机遇的思考
normalizedTitle: 对存储当下 未来风险与机遇的思考
representativeSources: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 独家 | 智谱 ARR 达到10 亿美元，半年增长 15 倍
content: Chinese AI startup Zhipu reached $1 billion ARR by July 2026, growing 15-fold in six months—far faster than projected. The company achieved this milestone in just 5 months from $100 million ARR, compared to Anthropic's 15 months. Zhipu's growth was driven by early investment in AI coding capabilities, with its GLM-5.2 model competitive against top Western counterparts. Despite price increases exceeding 80%, API usage surged 400% in Q1. The coding AI sector is attracting intensifying competition domestically and internationally.

title: 别再写提示词，Claude官方亲自教你用4种循环自动干活
content: Claude Code has defined four AI agent loop types with distinct stop conditions. Turn-based loops let humans control each round manually. Goal loops use an evaluator model to check against fixed standards before stopping. Time loops trigger at set intervals like cron jobs. Proactive loops run unattended, triggered by events or schedules, suitable for continuous tasks like bug triage. The article emphasizes that effective loop design requires clear verification methods, cost controls, and gating conditions—machine-checkable done states, hard caps on rounds/spending, and stagnation detection—to prevent runaway costs and endless unproductive cycles.
eventKey: 别再写提示词-claude官方亲自教你用4种循环自动干活
normalizedTitle: 别再写提示词 claude官方亲自教你用4种循环自动干活

title: 复盘2015：那个盛夏
content: In July 2015, the narrator vacationed with parents at a rural Beijing cottage when China's A-share market crashed. Despite holding full positions in Liyade stock through multiple consecutive limit-down days with zero leverage, the parents maintained complete trust without complaint. Meanwhile, a leveraged friend went bankrupt overnight, sitting on his doorstep in despair. The narrator's sister nearly sold at the panic bottom but was persuaded to hold. The year ended with 142% returns, and Liyade rose to new highs in 2016–2017. Core lessons: leverage kills in bear markets; survival comes from valuing fundamentals, preserving capital, and honoring trust rather than timing markets.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 八万顷
eventKey: 复盘2015-那个盛夏
normalizedTitle: 复盘2015 那个盛夏
representativeSources: 热帖 - 雪球 - 八万顷

title: papi酱用AI制造了2026第一神曲
content: Papi Jiang's AI-generated song "Sheng Qi Le" became 2026's first viral hit, spreading across Chinese social media through memes, video remixes, and brand marketing. The track, with AI-composed music and human-written lyrics blending melancholic闽南 melody with absurd modern complaints, exemplifies how AI lowers music creation barriers. Similar phenomena emerged globally, like Bill Stiteler's AI Puerto Rico song. These cases show music evolving from finished artworks into easily adaptable, rapidly produced content tools for personal expression, social interaction, and commercial use—driven by "borrowed nostalgia" and meme-friendly simplicity rather than musical innovation itself.

content: DeepSeek is preparing for a second funding round of $7.4 billion at a $74 billion valuation, targeting a STAR Market IPO filing this year and listing next year. Through QFLP structures, it accepts U.S. dollar investments, including from Middle Eastern investors via direct shareholding or SPVs. The AI company reports annual recurring revenue of $400–500 million with over 50% gross margin and a price-to-sales ratio around 148x. Its May Series A raised approximately $7.4 billion at a $57 billion valuation from investors including Tencent and JD.com, with founder Liang Wenfeng as the largest single contributor.

title: OpenAI 介绍内部漏洞检测模型 GPT-Red
content: OpenAI introduced GPT-Red, an internal "red team" model that automates simulated cyberattacks to improve product robustness. Trained via self-play reinforcement learning alongside defensive LLMs, it evolves stronger attacks as defenses improve. Since GPT-5.3, every production model has been trained with GPT-Red, reducing chain-of-thought attack success rates dramatically—GPT-5.6 Sol shows only 0.05% failure on direct prompt injection. The model is isolated from production systems.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - IT 之家
eventKey: openai-介绍内部漏洞检测模型-gpt-red
normalizedTitle: openai 介绍内部漏洞检测模型 gpt-red
